what: Check and Explore Summarised Results from the OMOP Common Data Model
title: Check and Explore Summarised Results from the OMOP Common Data Model
text: goal OmopCheckout validate explore summarised_result objects produced working Observational Medical Outcomes Partnership (OMOP) Common Data Model. helps ensure results correctly formatted adequately suppressed sharing. also helps explore content summarised_result object.

title: Check and Explore Summarised Results from the OMOP Common Data Model
text: OmopCheckout can installed cran : can install development GitHub :

title: Check and Explore Summarised Results from the OMOP Common Data Model
text: summarised_result standardised output format used across OHDSI R package ecosystem (e.g. CohortCharacteristics, IncidencePrevalence, DrugUtilisation). learn , see omopgenerics documentation.

title: Check and Explore Summarised Results from the OMOP Common Data Model
Check and Explore Summarised Results from the OMOP Common Data Model
text: checkout() runs complete audit summarised_result object covering suppression status, package metadata, estimate types.
code: checkout(omopViewerResults) #> ## <summarised_result> #>  #> ### Suppression #>  #> - Results suppressed with **minCellCount = 5** for result IDs: 1–122 (55,103 rows; 100.0%) #>  #> ### Packages #>  #> **CodelistGenerator (3.5.0)** for result IDs: 6–10 (183 rows ; 0.3%): #>  #> - *achilles_code_use* for result IDs: 9 (12 rows ; <0.1%) #> - *code_use* for result IDs: 8 (24 rows ; <0.1%) #> - *cohort_code_use* for result IDs: 7 (144 rows ; 0.3%) #> - *orphan_code_use* for result IDs: 6 (2 rows ; <0.1%) #> - *unmapped_codes* for result IDs: 10 (1 rows ; <0.1%) #>  #> **CohortCharacteristics (1.1.0)** for result IDs: 11–17 (31,413 rows ; 57.0%): #>  #> - *summarise_characteristics* for result IDs: 14 (63 rows ; 0.1%) #> - *summarise_cohort_attrition* for result IDs: 13 (16 rows ; <0.1%) #> - *summarise_cohort_count* for result IDs: 12 (2 rows ; <0.1%) #> - *summarise_cohort_overlap* for result IDs: 11 (180 rows ; 0.3%) #> - *summarise_cohort_timing* for result IDs: 15 (30,930 rows ; 56.1%) #> - *summarise_large_scale_characteristics* for result IDs: 16–17 (222 rows ; 0.4%) #>  #> **CohortSurvival (1.1.0)** for result IDs: 96–115 (7,038 rows ; 12.8%): #>  #> - *survival_attrition* for result IDs: 108–111, 115 (84 rows ; 0.2%) #> - *survival_estimates* for result IDs: 96–99, 112 (6,588 rows ; 12.0%) #> - *survival_events* for result IDs: 100–103, 113 (252 rows ; 0.5%) #> - *survival_summary* for result IDs: 104–107, 114 (114 rows ; 0.2%) #>  #> **DrugUtilisation (1.0.5)** for result IDs: 90–95 (339 rows ; 0.6%): #>  #> - *summarise_dose_coverage* for result IDs: 91 (32 rows ; 0.1%) #> - *summarise_drug_restart* for result IDs: 94 (24 rows ; <0.1%) #> - *summarise_drug_utilisation* for result IDs: 93 (72 rows ; 0.1%) #> - *summarise_indication* for result IDs: 92 (36 rows ; title: Check and Explore Summarised Results from the OMOP Common Data Model
text: summarySuppress() reports suppression status result_id — results suppressed, minimum cell count, many rows affected.
code: summarySuppress(omopViewerResults) #> - Results suppressed with **minCellCount = 5** for result IDs: 1–122 (55,103 rows; 100.0%)

title: Check and Explore Summarised Results from the OMOP Common Data Model
text: summaryPackages() reports package name version produced result, broken result type.

title: Check and Explore Summarised Results from the OMOP Common Data Model
text: functions support output argument:
code: # Print to console (default) checkout(omopViewerResults, output = "console")  # Return as a character string report <- checkout(omopViewerResults, output = "text")  # Open as HTML in the RStudio viewer checkout(omopViewerResults, output = "show")  # Save to a Markdown file checkout(omopViewerResults, output = "my_report.md")

title: Check and Explore Summarised Results from the OMOP Common Data Model
text: point--click interface, launch built-Shiny app checkoutShiny(). allows upload summarised_result .csv file interactively explore validate contents.

what: OmopCheckout: Check and Explore Summarised Results from the OMOP Common Data Model — OmopCheckout-package
title: OmopCheckout: Check and Explore Summarised Results from the OMOP Common Data Model — OmopCheckout-package
text: Provides tools validate explore 'summarised_result' objects produced working Observational Medical Outcomes Partnership (OMOP) Common Data Model. Checks results correctly formatted adequately suppressed, provides utilities explore understand content.

title: OmopCheckout: Check and Explore Summarised Results from the OMOP Common Data Model — OmopCheckout-package
text: Maintainer: Cecilia Campanile cecilia.campanile@ndorms.ox.ac.uk (ORCID) Authors: Martí Català marti.catalasabate@ndorms.ox.ac.uk (ORCID)

title: Check a summarised_result object — checkout
text: Runs full audit `summarised_result` object, covering suppression status, package metadata, estimate types. report can printed console, returned text, shown RStudio viewer, saved Markdown file.

title: Check a summarised_result object — checkout
Check a summarised_result object — checkout
text: result `summarised_result` object. output single character string specifying send output.   can : "console" print summary console. "text" return summary character string. "show" display result viewer (HTML format). Otherwise output used name '.md'     file write report .

title: Check a summarised_result object — checkout
text: character string containing summary checks, returned   invisibly unless output = "text".

what: Launch the OmopCheckout Shiny application — checkoutShiny
title: Launch the OmopCheckout Shiny application — checkoutShiny
text: Opens interactive Shiny application uploading, exploring, validating `summarised_result` objects. app provides checks [checkout()] point--click interface, without needing write R code. Also can explore results explore Tab.

title: Launch the OmopCheckout Shiny application — checkoutShiny
Launch the OmopCheckout Shiny application — checkoutShiny
text: Called side effect launching Shiny app. Returns   NULL invisibly.

what: Summarise estimate types by result type in a summarised_result object — summaryEstimates
title: Summarise estimate types by result type in a summarised_result object — summaryEstimates
text: unique `result_type` result settings, reports estimate names present along row counts percentage total.

title: Summarise estimate types by result type in a summarised_result object — summaryEstimates
Summarise estimate types by result type in a summarised_result object — summaryEstimates
text: result `summarised_result` object. output single character string specifying send output.   can : "console" print summary console. "text" return summary character string. "show" display result viewer (HTML format). Otherwise output used name '.md'     file write report .

title: Summarise estimate types by result type in a summarised_result object — summaryEstimates
text: character string containing estimates summary, returned   invisibly unless output = "text".

what: Summarise package usage in a summarised_result object — summaryPackages
title: Summarise package usage in a summarised_result object — summaryPackages
text: package name version found result settings, reports number rows result IDs associated , broken result type.

title: Summarise package usage in a summarised_result object — summaryPackages
Summarise package usage in a summarised_result object — summaryPackages
text: result `summarised_result` object. output single character string specifying send output.   can : "console" print summary console. "text" return summary character string. "show" display result viewer (HTML format). Otherwise output used name '.md'     file write report .

title: Summarise package usage in a summarised_result object — summaryPackages
text: character string containing package summary, returned   invisibly unless output = "text".

what: Check suppression correctness for each result_id — summarySuppress
title: Check suppression correctness for each result_id — summarySuppress
text: unique `result_id` `result`, checks whether suppression applied reports minimum cell count used, number rows affected, percentage total results suppressed unsuppressed.

title: Check suppression correctness for each result_id — summarySuppress
Check suppression correctness for each result_id — summarySuppress
text: result `summarised_result` object. output single character string specifying send output.   can : "console" print summary console. "text" return summary character string. "show" display result viewer (HTML format). Otherwise output used name '.md'     file write report .

title: Check suppression correctness for each result_id — summarySuppress
text: character string containing suppression summary, returned   invisibly unless output = "text".
